data.name: Complimentary delivery on orders over 50 KWD
data.value: Complimentary delivery on orders over 50 KWD

data.name: New Spring Edit — now in stores
data.value: New Spring Edit — now in stores

data.name: Pay with KNET, Apple Pay & Tabby
data.value: Pay with KNET, Apple Pay & Tabby

data.name: Manage where we deliver and bill.
data.value: Manage where we deliver and bill.

data.name: No orders yet — your first order will appear here.
data.value: No orders yet — your first order will appear here.

data.name: No saved address yet — add one for faster checkout.
data.value: No saved address yet — add one for faster checkout.

data.name: Nothing saved yet — tap the heart on any piece to keep it here.
data.value: Nothing saved yet — tap the heart on any piece to keep it here.

data.name: Made in Kuwait. Designed for the GCC.
data.value: Made in Kuwait. Designed for the GCC.

data.name: Save your pieces, track orders, and unlock first looks at our SS26 lookbook — exclusively for members.
data.value: Save your pieces, track orders, and unlock first looks at our SS26 lookbook — exclusively for members.

data.name: Sign in to access your orders, wishlist and saved addresses.
data.value: Sign in to access your orders, wishlist and saved addresses.

data.name: Create your account in 30 seconds — never miss an edit.
data.value: Create your account in 30 seconds — never miss an edit.

data.name: Send me styling notes & new arrivals via email and WhatsApp · I can unsubscribe any time
data.value: Send me styling notes & new arrivals via email and WhatsApp · I can unsubscribe any time

data.name: Enter the email on your account and we'll send a reset link.
data.value: Enter the email on your account and we'll send a reset link.

data.name: We've sent a reset link to
data.value: We've sent a reset link to

data.name: No email? Check your spam folder, or
data.value: No email? Check your spam folder, or

data.name: Chat with the atelier on WhatsApp
data.value: Chat with the atelier on WhatsApp

data.name: Any captured payment is returned to the original payment method within 3–5 working days.
data.value: Any captured payment is returned to the original payment method within 3–5 working days.

data.name: was refunded to your original payment method.
data.value: was refunded to your original payment method.

data.name: This order was refunded to your original payment method.
data.value: This order was refunded to your original payment method.

data.name: We've received your order and emailed a confirmation to
data.value: We've received your order and emailed a confirmation to

data.name: We'll let you know the moment it's on the move.
data.value: We'll let you know the moment it's on the move.

data.name: Your payment is confirmed — the atelier is preparing your pieces now.
data.value: Your payment is confirmed — the atelier is preparing your pieces now.

data.name: Your pieces are packed at our Kuwait atelier and ready for the courier.
data.value: Your pieces are packed at our Kuwait atelier and ready for the courier.

data.name: Your order left our Kuwait atelier. The courier will WhatsApp before delivery.
data.value: Your order left our Kuwait atelier. The courier will WhatsApp before delivery.

data.name: Your order was delivered. We hope you love it — returns stay open for 14 days.
data.value: Your order was delivered. We hope you love it — returns stay open for 14 days.

data.name: When you place your first order it will appear here.
data.value: When you place your first order it will appear here.

data.name: Manage your personal info, notifications and privacy.
data.value: Manage your personal info, notifications and privacy.

data.name: Get a copy of everything we have on file (orders, addresses, preferences).
data.value: Get a copy of everything we have on file (orders, addresses, preferences).

data.name: Permanently remove your account and personal data. Orders are kept for legal compliance.
data.value: Permanently remove your account and personal data. Orders are kept for legal compliance.

data.name: 14-day window from the day you receive your order.
data.value: 14-day window from the day you receive your order.

data.name: We collect from your address · 1–2 working days
data.value: We collect from your address · 1–2 working days

data.name: The Avenues, Phase 4 · any day, 10 AM – 10 PM
data.value: The Avenues, Phase 4 · any day, 10 AM – 10 PM

data.name: Select an eligible order to begin. Most refunds land in 3–5 working days.
data.value: Select an eligible order to begin. Most refunds land in 3–5 working days.

data.name: No returns yet — start one from a delivered order above.
data.value: No returns yet — start one from a delivered order above.

data.name: from the day you receive the order
data.value: from the day you receive the order

data.name: Sale items can be returned for
data.value: Sale items can be returned for

data.name: Final-sale pieces, swimwear and earrings cannot be returned
data.value: Final-sale pieces, swimwear and earrings cannot be returned

data.name: Tap the heart on any piece to keep it here.
data.value: Tap the heart on any piece to keep it here.

data.name: Begin with the new arrivals, or pick up where you left off in your wishlist.
data.value: Begin with the new arrivals, or pick up where you left off in your wishlist.

data.name: left in this size — order soon
data.value: left in this size — order soon

data.name: + 3.500 KWD · hand-folded, sealed with our wax mark
data.value: + 3.500 KWD · hand-folded, sealed with our wax mark

data.name: Add a note to your order
data.value: Add a note to your order

data.name: Special instructions — gift message, delivery directions, sizing notes…
data.value: Special instructions — gift message, delivery directions, sizing notes…

data.name: Secured by Tap Payments · PCI DSS Level 1
data.value: Secured by Tap Payments · PCI DSS Level 1

data.name: Free delivery in Kuwait over 50 KWD
data.value: Free delivery in Kuwait over 50 KWD

data.name: A confirmation is on its way to
data.value: A confirmation is on its way to

data.name: We've also sent you a WhatsApp update on
data.value: We've also sent you a WhatsApp update on

data.name: Pay the courier in cash on arrival
data.value: Pay the courier in cash on arrival

data.name: You have 1 hour to update size, address, or cancel.
data.value: You have 1 hour to update size, address, or cancel.

data.name: Save this address, track future orders, and unlock early access to lookbooks & private sales.
data.value: Save this address, track future orders, and unlock early access to lookbooks & private sales.

data.name: We'll use the email from your order
data.value: We'll use the email from your order

data.name: Send me styling notes & new arrivals · 1 email a week, never more
data.value: Send me styling notes & new arrivals · 1 email a week, never more

data.name: Save this address for next time
data.value: Save this address for next time

data.name: All payments processed by Tap Payments
data.value: All payments processed by Tap Payments

data.name: You will be redirected to KNET's secure page to authenticate this payment.
data.value: You will be redirected to KNET's secure page to authenticate this payment.

data.name: Confirm with Face ID or Touch ID
data.value: Confirm with Face ID or Touch ID

data.name: KNET, card & Apple Pay are processed securely by Tap Payments — you'll be redirected to complete your payment.
data.value: KNET, card & Apple Pay are processed securely by Tap Payments — you'll be redirected to complete your payment.

data.name: I've read and agree to the
data.value: I've read and agree to the

data.name: By placing this order you authorise White Stitches via Tap Payments to charge the amount above. Your card details are tokenised; we never store them.
data.value: By placing this order you authorise White Stitches via Tap Payments to charge the amount above. Your card details are tokenised; we never store them.

data.name: A curated edit of cuts, fabrics and silhouettes — designed for the woman who measures luxury in stitches, not labels.
data.value: A curated edit of cuts, fabrics and silhouettes — designed for the woman who measures luxury in stitches, not labels.

data.name: Be the first to receive new edits, private events and the SS26 lookbook.
data.value: Be the first to receive new edits, private events and the SS26 lookbook.

data.name: Welcome — the next edit lands in your inbox first.
data.value: Welcome — the next edit lands in your inbox first.

data.name: Also send me styling tips on WhatsApp
data.value: Also send me styling tips on WhatsApp

data.name: You're already on the list — we'll keep the edits coming.
data.value: You're already on the list — we'll keep the edits coming.

data.name: Our site is going through a quick refresh. We're back in roughly
data.value: Our site is going through a quick refresh. We're back in roughly

data.name: — the atelier itself is still open and you can WhatsApp us in the meantime.
data.value: — the atelier itself is still open and you can WhatsApp us in the meantime.

data.name: Want a heads-up when we're back?
data.value: Want a heads-up when we're back?

data.name: We'll email you the moment we're back online.
data.value: We'll email you the moment we're back online.

data.name: The link you followed doesn't lead anywhere on our site — maybe a typo, or maybe it's been moved.
data.value: The link you followed doesn't lead anywhere on our site — maybe a typo, or maybe it's been moved.

data.name: Styling guides, behind-the-scenes from our team, and the stories behind each piece.
data.value: Styling guides, behind-the-scenes from our team, and the stories behind each piece.

data.name: We haven't published any journal entries under this filter. Check back soon — or browse the full journal.
data.value: We haven't published any journal entries under this filter. Check back soon — or browse the full journal.

data.name: Writes here about the pieces we make and the people we make them with.
data.value: Writes here about the pieces we make and the people we make them with.

data.name: For the women of the GCC.
data.value: For the women of the GCC.

data.name: Founded in 2024, White Stitches is a small atelier in the heart of Kuwait City — quietly designing pieces meant to outlast a season.
data.value: Founded in 2024, White Stitches is a small atelier in the heart of Kuwait City — quietly designing pieces meant to outlast a season.

data.name: We started White Stitches because we were tired of fast fashion that didn't fit our climate, our culture, or our values.
data.value: We started White Stitches because we were tired of fast fashion that didn't fit our climate, our culture, or our values.

data.name: Block 3, Sharq Tower · Floor 3 · Kuwait City
data.value: Block 3, Sharq Tower · Floor 3 · Kuwait City

data.name: Whether it's sizing, a special request or just to say hello — reach out however suits you.
data.value: Whether it's sizing, a special request or just to say hello — reach out however suits you.

data.name: Fastest response · usually under 15 minutes during business hours.
data.value: Fastest response · usually under 15 minutes during business hours.

data.name: For longer enquiries, returns, partnerships. We reply within 24 hours.
data.value: For longer enquiries, returns, partnerships. We reply within 24 hours.

data.name: For everything else — we'll come back to you within 24 hours.
data.value: For everything else — we'll come back to you within 24 hours.

data.name: we've received your enquiry and will reply within 24 hours.
data.value: we've received your enquiry and will reply within 24 hours.

data.name: I consent to White Stitches contacting me by email and WhatsApp regarding this enquiry. See our
data.value: I consent to White Stitches contacting me by email and WhatsApp regarding this enquiry. See our

data.name: How we use cookies and similar technologies — and how you can control them.
data.value: How we use cookies and similar technologies — and how you can control them.

data.name: Quick answers to the questions we get most. Can't find what you're looking for? WhatsApp us.
data.value: Quick answers to the questions we get most. Can't find what you're looking for? WhatsApp us.

data.name: How long does it take to process my order?
data.value: How long does it take to process my order?

data.name: What payment methods do you accept?
data.value: What payment methods do you accept?

data.name: Can I change or cancel my order after placing it?
data.value: Can I change or cancel my order after placing it?

data.name: Do you ship to PO boxes?
data.value: Do you ship to PO boxes?

data.name: How do I start a return?
data.value: How do I start a return?

data.name: How do I care for my pieces?
data.value: How do I care for my pieces?

data.name: Do I need an account to order?
data.value: Do I need an account to order?

data.name: How do you use my data?
data.value: How do you use my data?

data.name: How we collect, use and protect your personal information. We respect your privacy and never sell your data.
data.value: How we collect, use and protect your personal information. We respect your privacy and never sell your data.

data.name: 14 days from the day you receive your order. Unworn pieces with original tags. Refunds in 3–5 working days.
data.value: 14 days from the day you receive your order. Unworn pieces with original tags. Refunds in 3–5 working days.

data.name: Free standard delivery in Kuwait over 50 KWD. Express, same-day and pickup options available.
data.value: Free standard delivery in Kuwait over 50 KWD. Express, same-day and pickup options available.

data.name: The agreement between you and White Stitches when you buy from us.
data.value: The agreement between you and White Stitches when you buy from us.

data.name: Enter your order number and email to see the latest. No account needed.
data.value: Enter your order number and email to see the latest. No account needed.

data.name: This order is no longer on its way. If you weren't expecting that,
data.value: This order is no longer on its way. If you weren't expecting that,

data.name: Double-check the order number and email match what's in your confirmation. Still stuck?
data.value: Double-check the order number and email match what's in your confirmation. Still stuck?

data.name: The one you used at checkout
data.value: The one you used at checkout

data.name: Delivery and taxes calculated at checkout.
data.value: Delivery and taxes calculated at checkout.

data.name: Start exploring — the SS26 edit is waiting.
data.value: Start exploring — the SS26 edit is waiting.

data.name: An error occurred while processing your request.
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Try widening one of your selections or clearing the filters to see the full edit.
data.value: Try widening one of your selections or clearing the filters to see the full edit.

data.name: VAT included · Free shipping over 50 KWD
data.value: VAT included · Free shipping over 50 KWD

data.name: Free standard delivery within Kuwait on orders above 50 KWD
data.value: Free standard delivery within Kuwait on orders above 50 KWD

data.name: Same-day delivery in Kuwait City for orders before 2 PM
data.value: Same-day delivery in Kuwait City for orders before 2 PM

data.name: GCC delivery 3–5 working days · duties included
data.value: GCC delivery 3–5 working days · duties included

data.name: Easy returns within 14 days · unworn, with tags · refund to original payment method
data.value: Easy returns within 14 days · unworn, with tags · refund to original payment method

data.name: Search the edit — dresses, linen, evening and more.
data.value: Search the edit — dresses, linen, evening and more.

data.name: We couldn't find anything matching that. Try a different word, browse a category, or talk to our atelier.
data.value: We couldn't find anything matching that. Try a different word, browse a category, or talk to our atelier.

data.value: Double-check the order number and email match what’s in your confirmation. Still stuck?
